---
name: Protocol Change
about: Propose a protocol, schema, route, event, or compatibility change
title: ""
labels: protocol-change
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed protocol change.

## Motivation

Explain the implementation or interoperability problem this solves.

## Proposed Contract

List affected routes, events, fields, schemas, error codes, authorization scopes,
or lifecycle rules.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Non-breaking clarification
- [ ] Non-breaking additive change
- [ ] Breaking v1 change
- [ ] New major version required

Explain the compatibility impact using `VERSIONING.md`.

## Security And Privacy Impact

Describe changes to Runtime identity, Device trust, Pairing, Session resume,
authorization, replay prevention, logging, or transfer handling.

## Fixtures And Validation

List valid and invalid fixtures that should be added or changed.

## Alternatives

Describe alternatives considered, including why this should be protocol behavior
rather than implementation behavior.
